LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANTS NATALIE TROST AND BELLWETHER ELECTION SOLUTIONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PARTIES FAILED TO MEET AND CONFER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED IMMEDIATELY TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE CITED DEFECTS. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY APRIL 29, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS NATALIE TROST and BELLWETHER ELECTION SOLUTIONS' DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is Off calendar. The parties failed to meet and confer in compliance with CCP 435.5. Plaintiff is ordered immediately to meet and confer regarding the cited defects. Defendant's response to the complaint is now due by April 29, 2022.
